mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, type, severity, title, message, action_url, entity_type, entity_id, dedupe_key, read_at, created_at, updated_at FROM notifications WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET type = #{type}, severity = #{severity}, title = #{title}, message = #{message}, action_url = #{actionUrl}, entity_type = #{entityType}, entity_id = #{entityId}, read_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE notifications SET read_at = COALESCE(read_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
